title: Different Dungeon's Delight Living Fire
description: Recolors all Instances of Dungeon's Delight's Living Fire to be Magenta instead of Green.
body: A simple retexture of all of [Dungeon's Delight's](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonsdelight) Living Fire to be magenta instead of green. This pack was originally made to make Living Fire distinct from Caverns and Chasms' Cupric Fire.
